title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

International Registered Students

Announcements

24
						October

2025

The

will be held

online

via

O’Learn

on

Monday, October 27, 2025

.

Please log in to

O’Learn

using your username and password, and carefully read all announcements shared in the

ALAT course

you are/will be added to.

All important information such as

exam time, instructions, and class lists

will be available there.

Important Notes:

Students who score

70 or above

on this exam will be eligible to take the

OPAE Exam

, which will be held

face-to-face on October 30–31, 2025 (Thursday & Friday)

.

Class lists

will be shared in the ALAT course on O’Learn. Please check your name and join your assigned class through the

Class Collab

section.

If your name is

not listed

, contact

aleyna.acikalin@okan.edu.tr

with your

student number and full name

.

It is

not recommended

to take the exam using a tablet or phone.

If the exam does not open on

Safari

, please try a

different browser

.

Good luck to all students taking the ALAT exam!

en

tr
